title: DNA extraction protocol
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dpf1o","text":"(N = number of samples)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cai9n","text":"Set the heatblock at  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":21,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"aptc5","text":"Set the oven at  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":16,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"965nj","text":"Heat C1 solution at   in the heatblock (aliquoted in a 1.5 ml tube)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":20,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"amfh5","text":"Preparte pippet tips (200 ul and 1000 ul)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"emv47","text":"Label N Dry Bead Tubes with sample numbers/names","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d66bs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8126t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2u9t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"874B5ED0716511E98E0B157D7DA329D5","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"DNA extraction protocol","temperature":"65","unit":10}},"1":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"89397330716511E98E0B157D7DA329D5","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"DNA extraction protocol","temperature":"37","unit":10}},"2":{"type":"temperature","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"8FAD0FB0716511E98E0B157D7DA329D5","id":0,"label":"","protocol_name":"DNA extraction protocol","temperature":"65","unit":10}}}}
steps: Heat the tubes for 15 minutes at 65 °C in the heatblock Meanwhile add 250 µL C2 solution to empty 1.5 ml tubes and label them (for step 7) Meanwhile add 200 µL C3 solution to empty 1.5 ml tubes and label them (for step 10)
Add the pellets to sterilised weigh trays and weigh the sample (note down number of pellets + total weight)
Add the pellets to the labelled Dry Bead Tubes with Bead Solution and give a quick spin
Add 60 µL of preheated C1 solution to each Dry Bead Tube and vortex thoroughly (15 sec)
Tissuelyse the tubes 10 minutes at freq 20 (2x20) in Precellys Tissue Homogenizer .
Centrifuge the tubes 13,000g for 3 minutes
Transfer the supernatant ( 450 µL ) to the 1.5 ml tubes containing C2 solution and vortex briefly
Incubate for 5 minutes at 4 °C Meanwhile label N spin filters and 2N collection tubes
Centrifuge the tubes 13,000g for 1 minute
Transfer the supernatant (up to 600 µL ) to the 1.5 ml tubes containing C3 solution and vortex briefly
Incubate for 5 minutes at 4 °C Meanwhile label N low-binding 1.5 ml tubes with sample names/numbers
Centrifuge the tubes 13,000g for 1 minute
Transfer the supernatant (up to 750 µL ) to the 2 ml Collection Tubes
Shake the C4 solution , add 1100 µL (550+550) to the supernatant and vortex briefly
Load 650 µL onto a Spin Filter, centrifuge 8,000g for 1 minute and discard the flowthrough to a 50ml falcon tube
Repeat the step 15 until loading all the mix
Add 500 µL of C5 solution and centrifuge at 13,000g for 1 minute. Check if the liquid spun through and discard the flowthrough Avoid splashing C5 solution onto the Spin Filter!
Centrifuge again at 13,000g for 1 minute and place the Spin Filter in a clean 2 ml Collection Tube
Add 50 ul C6 solution to the center of the Spin Filter and incubate at 37 °C 15 minutes
Centrifuge 13,000g for 1 minute and discard the Spin Filter
Transfer the extract to 1.5 low bind tubes and distribute the extracts in PCR strips
creator: Unai Baroja
